summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Data Entry tab system with Edit/Save/Cancel functionality. All core features working as expected - authentication resolved, tab navigation functional, per-tab edit mode works correctly with tab disabling, save/cancel operations working, keyboard shortcuts functional.

issues: React hydration warnings about span elements as children of select/option/tbody/tr elements - not affecting functionality but should be cleaned up

minor_observations.observation: No Edit button - the tab wraps AssessmentTable component directly without using isEditing props. This may be intentional if Assessment is table-based only.
No Edit button - this is a preview/print tab with Print and Download buttons. This appears intentional.

passed_tests: All 7 tabs visible and accessible (property-info, assessment, reference, signatories, other-property, previous-tdns, tag-dec)
Tab navigation works - can switch between all tabs
Edit mode activation - clicking Edit button enables edit mode with yellow banner indicator
Edit mode indicator shows which tab is being edited with tab-specific name
Tab disabling - other tabs are disabled (grayed out, not clickable) when one tab is in edit mode
Save functionality - clicking Save Changes saves data and exits edit mode
Cancel functionality - clicking Cancel discards changes and exits edit mode
Unsaved changes tracking - yellow dot appears on tab with unsaved changes
Form inputs disabled when not in edit mode
Form inputs enabled and editable in edit mode
Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+S saves and exits edit mode
Keyboard shortcut Escape cancels and exits edit mode
Tabs re-enabled after exiting edit mode
Authentication working correctly - previous session issues resolved
Navigation from dashboard to data-entry working
action_items: Consider adding Edit/Save/Cancel buttons to AssessmentTab if per-tab editing is required there
Consider adding data-testid attributes to buttons in AssessmentTab and TagDecTab for consistency
Fix React hydration warnings in console (span elements as children of table elements)
critical_code_review_comments: The tab manager hook (useTabManager.ts) is well-implemented with keyboard shortcuts and beforeunload handling
AssessmentTab receives isEditing/onEnterEdit props but doesn't use them - may want to pass these to AssessmentTable
TagDecTab receives editing props but doesn't use them - this is likely intentional for a preview tab
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses default mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab edit functionality is fully working for Property Information, Reference, Signatories, Other Property, and Previous TDNs tabs. Assessment and Tag Dec tabs don't have Edit buttons by design. Authentication is now working properly. The ConfirmLeaveModal appears when navigating away from page with unsaved changes (not when clicking disabled tabs). Console shows React hydration warnings about invalid HTML nesting but functionality is not affected.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED - Backend is mocked, all data is stored in React state only. No real API calls for saving data.
